betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Silicon§f

§aThe foundation of advanced circuits — essential for all mid-game and late-game electronics!§f

§bSilicon§f is a semiconducting element vital for creating advanced circuit boards. It requires an §bElectric Arc Furnace§f to produce.

§6Production§f (Arc Furnace):
§b• Sand§f → §e1§f silicon nugget
§b• Nether Quartz§f → §e3§f silicon nuggets
§b• Flint§f → §e4§f nuggets + quanta
§b• Asbestos§f → §e4§f nuggets + quanta
§b• Fiberglass§f → §e4§f nuggets + quanta

§6Processing§f:
§b• Silicon Boule§f → stamp with §bCircuit Stamp§f → §bPrinted Silicon Wafer§f
§b• Printed Wafer§f + Insulator + Copper Wire → §bMicrochip§f
§b• Microchip§f + Printed Wafer + Bismuth + Copper Wire → §bVersatile Integrated Circuit§f

§6Alternative§f: Silicon Boules can be acidized with §bOxygen§f to produce Nether Quartz, enabling redstone-free automation outside the Nether.

§eTip§f: Always use §bliquid mode§f on the Arc Furnace for a small yield bonus when producing silicon. Set up a Strand Caster under the outlet for automated billet casting!
